operational_scenes.scene_title: Tote Exchange Process and Lane Identification
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain how to exchange totes using API and lane naming conventions
operational_intents: Explain lane name formatting with leading zero
Discuss UPS capability for specific destination exchanges
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract procedural details and lane naming rules
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Focus on tote exchange and lane identification instructions

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe real-time KPIs related to destination exchanges
operational_intents: List KPIs such as average item count, median exchange time, and miss sorts
Explain status indicators like active, bypassed, or not tracking
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract KPI definitions and status explanations
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Capture key performance indicators and their meanings

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss navigation to metrics page and user login details
operational_intents: Explain how to access skip metrics page
Mention user login status and personnel availability
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract navigation steps and user context
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Clarify system access and user presence

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain zone configuration history and current usage limitations
operational_intents: Describe ability to change configurations between sorts historically
Note current limitations due to equal zones
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract configuration history and current constraints
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Understand zone config evolution and restrictions

operational_scenes.primary_intent: Describe how to initialize totes and handle initialization responses
operational_intents: Explain input of barcode, tote number, station, and tote ID
Describe request to initialize tote and response handling
Discuss conditions preventing initialization such as AGV status
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract tote initialization steps and error handling
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Detail tote setup and response interpretation
